positive: A majestic, minimalist portrait of a bioluminescent constellation forest at twilight. The scene features stylized, glowing celestial flora and gently curving, abstract constellations connecting the elements. The color palette is deep indigo, electric sapphire blue, vibrant teal, and shimmering gold accents. Focus on clean, high-contrast silhouettes of the trees and stars against a gradient gradient sky. Cinematic, ethereal mood. Style: Art Nouveau meets modern vector illustration, perfect for screen printing on apparel. Composition: Central, balanced, circular arrangement, highly scalable and repeatable. Lighting: Deep contrast, emitting soft glow from the flora.
negative: photorealistic, low resolution, artifacts, blur, noise, text, watermark, logo, signature, bad anatomy, extra limbs, dirty, messy, ugly, monochrome, grainy, gradient, out of focus
